code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_line(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  mut has = false
  mut neg = false
  mut val = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
      has = true
    else if b == 45 and not has and not neg
      neg = true
    else
      if has
        if neg
          val = 0 - val
        end
        result = list.push(result, val)
      end
      val = 0
      has = false
      neg = false
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has
    if neg
      val = 0 - val
    end
    result = list.push(result, val)
  end
  result
end

fn add_unique_sorted(_ xs: List<Int>, _ v: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  mut skip = false
  let n = xs.len()
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let cur = match xs.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if inserted or skip
      result = list.push(result, cur)
    else if cur == v
      result = list.push(result, cur)
      skip = true
    else if cur > v
      result = list.push(result, v)
      result = list.push(result, cur)
      inserted = true
    else
      result = list.push(result, cur)
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not inserted and not skip
    result = list.push(result, v)
  end
  result
end

let line1 = match io.read_line()
when Some(x)
  x
when None
  ""
end
let line2 = match io.read_line()
when Some(x)
  x
when None
  ""
end

let a = parse_line(line1)
let b = parse_line(line2)

mut sorted: List<Int> = []

mut i = 0
while i < a.len()
  let v = match a.get(i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  sorted = add_unique_sorted(sorted, v)
  i = i + 1
end

mut j = 0
while j < b.len()
  let v = match b.get(j)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  sorted = add_unique_sorted(sorted, v)
  j = j + 1
end

mut out = ""
mut k = 0
while k < sorted.len()
  let v = match sorted.get(k)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if k == 0
    out = "#{v}"
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  k = k + 1
end
println(out)
